title: taraxacum subargutum
intro: Taraxacum subargutum, also known as the small-leaved dandelion or small dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus, which is commonly found in mountainous and alpine regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subargutum include its ability to promote digestion, reduce blood pressure, and help with urinary issues, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, used as a tincture, or added to salads and other dishes to take advantage of its nutritional benefits.
